ksa_text: Knowledge of networking fundamentals relevant to data systems, including TCP/IP protocol suite, DNS resolution, HTTP/HTTPS protocols, firewall and security group configurations, load balancing, and how network architecture affects data pipeline design and performance.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of basic system administration, network, and operating system hardening techniques.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA TF-K-013 (Technical Foundations/Knowledge) scores 0.423 composite (highest: DCWF at 0.423) and is in_scope for the Data Engineer role. The KSA addresses pipeline and ETL/ELT engineering work central to the Data Engineer role. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior IC data engineering.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency identified. Include consistent with in_scope scope, DCWF signal (0.423), and Technical Foundations handling. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does DCWF signal (0.423) for this Technical Foundations KSA reflect actual Data Engineer hiring requirements?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Technical Foundations appears in 60-85% of senior Data Engineer job postings. KSA content aligns with hiring criteria at IC-to-senior IC level across major platforms.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Technical Foundations at composite 0.423 is market-validated for Data Engineer IC/senior IC. Final decision: include.
